notes.boost: Pal Essence Condenser can increase a Work Suitability by one level

suitabilities.name: Kindling
suitabilities.description: Allows Pals to power furnaces and help cook food.

suitabilities.name: Watering
suitabilities.description: Enables Pals to water crops and power water wheels.

suitabilities.name: Planting
suitabilities.description: Lets Pals plant seeds in farms.

suitabilities.name: Handiwork
suitabilities.description: Enables Pals to manage crafting benches, conveyor belts, and similar setups.

suitabilities.name: Gathering
suitabilities.description: Allows Pals to harvest crops and carry bodies.

suitabilities.name: Medicine Production
suitabilities.description: Lets Pals create medicine at specific workbenches.

suitabilities.name: Cooling
suitabilities.description: Allows Pals to cool down containers.

suitabilities.name: Transporting
suitabilities.description: Lets Pals move items into storage units from harvest stations or the ground.

suitabilities.name: Farming
suitabilities.description: Allows Pals to drop items when placed in a ranch.

workPriority.summary: Lower priority values = higher priority. Critical tasks (attack/defense) first; specialized tasks (medicine, cooling) last.

tips: Enhance suitabilities with Pal Essence Condenser
Plan for specialized tasks (Cooling, Medicine Production)
Monitor Gathering and Transporting for resource flow
Use Monitor Stand to allow/disallow certain work
Pal Labor Research Laboratory research improves task speed and costs
